# GitHub Repository Optimization Guide

## 🔍 Why Your Repo Isn't Showing in Search

GitHub search for repositories works based on:

1. **Repository name** (highest weight)
2. **Description** (set in GitHub settings)
3. **Topics** (set in GitHub settings - CRITICAL!)
4. **README content**
5. **Stars and activity** (repos need some engagement)

## ⚠️ CRITICAL: Manual GitHub Settings Required

You MUST go to https://github.com/odykyi/agentic-comparison and:

### 1. Add Repository Description

Click the gear icon ⚙️ next to "About" and add:

```
🎨 AI Skills Marketplace - Compare 10+ agentic coding tools, discover 40+ AI skills, find MCP servers. The ultimate skills marketplace for AI coding agents.
```

### 2. Add Topics (Most Important!)

Add these topics (type each one, hit enter):

- `skills-marketplace` ⭐ REQUIRED
- `ai-skills` ⭐ REQUIRED
- `marketplace` ⭐ REQUIRED
- `ai-agents`
- `coding-agents`
- `mcp`
- `mcp-servers`
- `model-context-protocol`
- `claude-code`
- `codex`
- `cursor`
- `windsurf`
- `developer-tools`
- `ai-tools`
- `llm-tools`
- `automation`
- `productivity`

### 3. Add Website URL

Set to: `https://odykyi.github.io/agentic-comparison/`

### 4. Check "Releases"

If you have any releases, they help with visibility

## 📝 What I Updated in the Repo

### README.md

- Added "AI Skills Marketplace" to title
- Added "skills marketplace" multiple times
- Added Keywords section with badges
- Created "Skills Marketplace" section
- Updated mission statement with keywords

### package.json

- Added keywords: `skills`, `skills-marketplace`, `ai-skills`, `marketplace`

### .github/TOPICS.md

- Documented recommended topics

## 🔥 Pro Tips for Better Search Ranking

1. **Get some stars** - Share on Twitter, Reddit r/selfhosted, Discord servers
2. **Create a release** - Even a simple v0.1.0 helps
3. **Add GitHub Actions** - Makes the repo look active
4. **Pin the repo** on your GitHub profile
5. **Wait 24-48 hours** - GitHub search indexing takes time

## 🎯 Alternative: Rename Repository (Nuclear Option)

If you want to rank #1 for "skills marketplace", rename to:

- `ai-skills-marketplace`
- `agent-skills-marketplace`
- `coding-skills-marketplace`

⚠️ This breaks existing links. Use with caution!

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Added description in GitHub settings
- [ ] Added topics: `skills-marketplace`, `ai-skills`, `marketplace`
- [ ] Added website URL
- [ ] Starred your own repo (yes, this helps!)
- [ ] Shared on social media for stars
- [ ] Waited 48 hours for indexing
- [ ] Test search: https://github.com/search?q=skills+marketplace&type=repositories
